cta.headline: Ready to Get Your Car Running Smoothly?

servicesPage.intro: At JC's Automotive, we offer a full range of auto repair and maintenance services for all makes and models. Our experienced technicians use the latest tools and techniques to ensure your vehicle runs safely and efficiently.

services.title: Engine Diagnostics & Repair
services.shortDescription: Comprehensive engine diagnostics and repair to restore performance.
services.longDescription: Our advanced diagnostic equipment quickly identifies engine issues, from misfires to complex sensor problems. We provide precise repairs using quality parts to ensure long-lasting results.

process.title: Computer Scan
process.description: We connect to your vehicle's computer to read error codes and data.

process.title: Inspection & Test
process.description: Our technicians perform a thorough inspection and road test.

process.title: Repair & Verification
process.description: We complete the repair and verify performance with a final test.

faqs.question: How long does an engine diagnostic take?
faqs.answer: Most diagnostics are completed within 1-2 hours, depending on complexity.

faqs.question: Do I need an appointment?
faqs.answer: Appointments are recommended, but we accept walk-ins as time allows.

services.title: Brake Repair & Service
services.shortDescription: Expert brake inspection, repair, and replacement for safety.
services.longDescription: Your safety depends on reliable brakes. We inspect pads, rotors, calipers, and fluid, and provide high-quality replacements to restore stopping power.

process.title: Brake Inspection
process.description: We check brake pads, rotors, calipers, and fluid levels.

process.title: Component Replacement
process.description: Worn parts are replaced with premium components.

process.title: System Test
process.description: We test the brakes for proper function and road test the vehicle.

faqs.question: How often should I replace brake pads?
faqs.answer: Typically every 30,000-70,000 miles, depending on driving habits.

faqs.question: What are signs of brake problems?
faqs.answer: Squealing, grinding, vibration, or a soft brake pedal.

services.title: Oil Change & Maintenance
services.shortDescription: Regular oil changes and preventive maintenance to keep your car running.
services.longDescription: Routine oil changes are vital for engine health. We use quality oils and filters, and also offer multi-point inspections to catch issues early.

process.title: Drain Old Oil
process.description: We drain the old oil and replace the filter.

process.title: Add Fresh Oil
process.description: We add the correct grade and amount of fresh oil.

process.title: Multi-Point Check
process.description: We inspect belts, hoses, fluids, and tire pressure.

faqs.question: How often should I change my oil?
faqs.answer: Every 3,000-5,000 miles for conventional oil, or as recommended by your manufacturer.

faqs.question: What type of oil do you use?
faqs.answer: We offer conventional, synthetic blend, and full synthetic options.

services.title: AC & Heating Repair
services.shortDescription: Keep your cabin comfortable with expert AC and heating service.
services.longDescription: Whether your AC blows warm air or your heater isn't working, we diagnose and repair climate control systems to keep you comfortable year-round.

process.title: System Inspection
process.description: We check refrigerant levels, compressor, and heater core.

process.title: Leak Detection
process.description: We use UV dye and electronic detectors to find leaks.

process.title: Repair & Recharge
process.description: We repair components and recharge the system to specifications.

faqs.question: Why is my AC not cold?
faqs.answer: Common causes include low refrigerant, a faulty compressor, or a leak.

faqs.question: How long does an AC repair take?
faqs.answer: Most repairs are completed within 2-4 hours.

about.headline: About JC's Automotive
about.mission: Our mission is to provide honest, high-quality auto repair services that keep Dallas drivers safe and satisfied.
story: JC's Automotive has been a trusted name in Dallas auto repair for over 15 years. Founded by John Carter, a master mechanic with a passion for cars, our shop started as a small two-bay garage and has grown into a full-service facility serving thousands of customers. We believe in transparency, quality workmanship, and building long-term relationships with our clients.

Today, we employ a team of ASE-certified technicians who share our commitment to excellence. We invest in the latest diagnostic equipment and training to handle everything from routine maintenance to complex repairs. Our goal is simple: get you back on the road safely and affordably.

coreValues.title: Integrity
coreValues.description: We always tell you what your car needs and why.

coreValues.title: Quality
coreValues.description: We use top-tier parts and stand behind our work.

coreValues.title: Reliability
coreValues.description: We complete repairs on time, every time.

coreValues.title: Community
coreValues.description: We proudly serve Dallas and support local causes.

contact.headline: Get in Touch
contact.subheadline: Call us or stop by for a free estimate.
